subcodes.first_line: We give glad tidings unto the members of the assembly, inasmuch as their deeds have been adorned with the ornament of acceptance and illumined with the light of divine good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصحاب مجلس را بشارت میدهیم چه که عملشان بطراز قبول مزین و بنور رضا منور طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
